text.title: Glossary Management (Living Doc) Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end walked example applying the glossary-management-living-doc methodology, producing a valid artefact per `02-output-contract.xml`.

section.title: End-to-end example
section.narrative: Engineering vs Support disagree on 'active customer' → conflict-resolution record opened → scoped split: billing.active_customer vs support.active_customer; both canonical; propagation hooks updated to code constants in each bounded context.

section.title: Resulting artefact
